description_long: This is a modern, two-seater sofa with a boxy silhouette and a dark, textured fabric upholstery. The sofa features two large, rectangular seat cushions and two matching backrest cushions, all of which appear to be loose and uniform in size. The armrests are straight, thick, and extend from the base to just below the top of the backrest, providing a sturdy and comfortable support. The upholstery has a subtle, crosshatched pattern that gives the surface a visually interesting, woven appearance. The back of the sofa is fully upholstered and flat, with no visible legs or decorative elements. This piece is well-suited for urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or outdoor covered spaces.
description: A dark, boxy two-seater sofa with straight armrests and textured, crosshatched upholstery. Features two large seat and back cushions for a modern, comfortable look.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large seat and back cushions, straight armrests, and the full width of the sofa.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thick, straight armrest and the depth of the seat and back cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat, fully upholstered back and the sofa's overall rectangular shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the armrest and cushion depth, emphasizing the sofa's symmetry.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, loose seat cushions and two matching loose backrest cushions, all uniform in size and rectangular in shape.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, thick armrests at each end, extending from the base to just below the top of the backrest, with a boxy profile and fully upholstered in the same fabric.
attribute_leg_design: Legs are not visible, suggesting a recessed or hidden leg design, possibly block-style supports integrated into the base.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest with two large, loose cushions, continuous across the width with no visible tufting or segmentation beyond the cushion separation.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Dark fabric with a subtle, crosshatched or grid-like woven texture, giving a patterned but understated appearance.
